description_long: This object is a stylized, cartoon-like apricot with a large, round head and exaggerated features. The surface is smooth and colored in a gradient of orange hues, with a prominent pink bow on top and large, expressive eyes dominating the front. The apricot has a small, rounded body with short arms and legs, dressed in a pink and black outfit, and black shoes. The back view reveals a long, orange ponytail extending from the head, matching the apricot's overall color. The object is highly anthropomorphized, giving it a playful and whimsical appearance. There are no visible blemishes or natural fruit textures, and the surface finish is matte.
description: A cartoonish, anthropomorphic apricot with a large head, pink bow, and smooth orange surface, dressed in pink and black. Features include big eyes, a ponytail, and a playful, stylized design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large eyes, pink bow, and pink dress, with arms outstretched and both legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the protruding ponytail and the profile of the face, with one arm and leg visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the orange ponytail and the back of the bow, with minimal body detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the ponytail and side of the face, with the other arm and leg visible.
